channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Digital ticketing in daladalas is progress, but maintenance and cleanliness must follow
item.description: This opinion piece by Beatrice Materu discusses Tanzania’s plan to introduce electronic ticketing for daladalas, the popular minibuses that serve as a vital mode of public transport in cities like Dar...

item.title: Ugandan Diaspora Launches Savings Cooperative to Support National Economic Growth
item.description: Members of Uganda’s ruling National Resistance Movement (NRM) living abroad are set to launch a new Ugandan Diaspora Savings and Credit Cooperative Organisation (SACCO) at a ceremony in Cape Town late...

item.title: Global economic instability under Trump disrupts UK construction sector
item.description: The article highlights how recent economic disruptions caused by President Donald Trump’s policies and geopolitical actions have severely affected the UK construction industry. Following Trump’s escal...

item.title: Independent economist urges RBA to act with more caution amid inflation and global tensions
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) has once again raised interest rates in response to persistent inflation and the rising cost of living across the country. This decision comes at a time when many h...

item.title: India Achieves Record Coal Production and Maintains Sufficient Stocks for Power Plants
item.description: India has crossed the one-billion-tonne mark in coal production for the second consecutive year, with the milestone reached on March 20, 2026. The previous financial year 2024-25 saw a record high of ...

item.title: London Knights Secure Shootout Win Against Windsor Spitfires
item.description: The London Knights pulled off a thrilling 3-2 shootout victory over the Windsor Spitfires on Friday night at Canada Life Place. Goaltender Seb Gatto was the star, making 40 saves during regulation and...

item.title: 32 survivors rescued after tourist boat capsizes off Calatagan, Batangas
item.description: Thirty-two passengers, including several minors, were rescued after a motorized boat capsized in the waters off Calatagan, Batangas on Thursday. According to the Philippine Coast Guard (District South...

item.title: Editors urge police to act on assault of journalists in Trans Nzoia
item.description: Media practitioners in Trans Nzoia County have condemned an attack on two journalists that took place during a Kenya Kwanza grassroots development consultative meeting in Motosiet Ward, Cherangany Con...

item.title: Three suspected NPA members killed in Kabankalan firefight
item.description: In Kabankalan, Negros Occidental, three suspected members of the New People’s Army (NPA) were killed during a brief armed encounter with the Philippine Army’s 47th Infantry Battalion. The clash happen...

item.title: The Rand Show 2026: Family Fun and Entertainment Await
item.description: Johannesburg is gearing up for The Rand Show 2026, transforming the Johannesburg Expo Centre (Nasrec) into a vibrant festival hub from April 2nd to 6th. This year's event promises five days packed wit...

item.title: Understanding Patriarchal Violence Through the Cases of Gisele Pelicot and Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: The cases of Gisele Pelicot in France and Jeffrey Epstein in the United States expose the disturbing universality of patriarchal violence. Gisele Pelicot’s husband orchestrated her rape while she was ...

item.title: CAF overturns AFCON final result after Senegal walk-off, Morocco awarded title
item.description: Two months after winning the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON), Senegal has been stripped of the title following a decision by the Confederation of African Football (CAF). The ruling came after a controve...

item.title: Tanasha Donna Sparks Reactions After Hosting Diamond Platnumz’s Family in Nairobi
item.description: Tanasha Donna has stirred up mixed reactions on social media after posting a video with Diamond Platnumz's family, including his niece, in Nairobi. The video shows Tanasha, her son Naseeb Junior, Diam...

item.title: Critically Endangered Cantor's Softshell Turtle Returned to Apayao River Habitat
item.description: A critically endangered giant Cantor's softshell turtle, one of the world's rarest freshwater turtles, was released back into its natural habitat in a river in Pudtol, Apayao, on Thursday. The female ...

item.title: Suspected mass grave with several bodies exhumed in Kericho under police investigation
item.description: A suspected mass grave with multiple bodies has been discovered in Kericho County, sending shockwaves through the local community and prompting a swift police and forensic response. Initial reports in...

item.title: Eid Al-Fitr 2026: Expected Dates, Moon Sighting, and Timings Across India, UAE, and Saudi Arabia
item.description: The news article was intended to provide live updates for Eid Al-Fitr 2026, focusing on the moon sighting, exact dates, and timings for different countries including India, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE. ...

item.title: Trump's Controversial Disclosures About Others' Health and His Own Privacy
item.description: Donald Trump has recently disclosed that Republican Congressman Neal Dunn was facing a terminal health condition, which White House doctors treated to save his life. However, Trump's comments about Du...

item.title: Former FBI Director Robert Mueller Passes Away at 81
item.description: Robert Mueller, the former director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), has passed away at the age of 81. Mueller served as FBI director for 12 years, beginning just days before the Septembe...

item.title: Saudi Arabia Orders Expulsion of Iranian Military Envoy Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Saudi Arabia don order one Iranian military attache and three of im team members to comot from inside the country within 48 hours. The wahala start as the kingdom and other Gulf nations dey face serie...

item.title: Beto Stars in Everton's 3-0 Victory Over Chelsea, Dashing Blues' Top-Four Hopes
item.description: Beto was the hero for Everton, scoring twice and providing an assist in their impressive 3-0 victory over Chelsea in the Premier League on Saturday. The Guinea-Bissau striker gave Chelsea's defense pr...
